title: This startup raised $15M to break Nvidia’s tightest grip on AI, its software
summary: Infinity says it can strip away the one advantage that has kept Nvidia untouchable. Working with the chip maker d-Matrix, it says Ignition hit 92% of a new chip’s peak performance 10 hours after first touching the hardware.
